zh.lifeSummary: 當Joan Brightley於1330年出生在英國戴文希藍頓 薩維爾時，她的父親Brightley23歲，母親Joan Stowford23歲。她於1343年與William Pyne IV在英國英格蘭戴文結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1367年在英國英格蘭戴文韋斯特 唐享年37歲。

nameMeanings.name: Brightley
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: English: locative name from Brightley in Okehampton or Brightley Barton in Chittlehampton (both Devon).

variants.name: Brightly
meanings: English: habitational name from Brightley in Okehampton or Brightley Barton in Chittlehampton (both Devon).

nameMeanings.name: Joan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Joan Brightley was born in 1330, in Heanton Satchville, Devon, England, her father, Brightley, was 23 and her mother, Joan Stowford, was 23. She married William Pyne IV in 1343, in Devon, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 2 daughters. She died in 1367, in West Down, Devon, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 37.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Joan Brightley est née en 1330, à Heanton Satchville, Devon, Angleterre, son père, Brightley, avait 23 ans et sa mère, Joan Stowford, avait 23 ans. Elle a épousé William Pyne IV en 1343, à Devon, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée en 1367, à West Down, Devon, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 37 ans.

ja.lifeSummary: Joan Brightleyが1330年にイギリスデボンヒーントン サトチヴィルで生まれた時，父Brightleyは23歳，母Joan Stowfordは23歳であった。1343年にイギリスイギリスデボンでWilliam Pyne IVと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1367年にイギリスイギリスデボンウエスト ダウンで37歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Joan Brightley(이)가 1330년 영국 데폰 히턴 새트ch빌에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Brightley(은)는 23세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Joan Stowford(은)는 23세였다. 그녀는 1343년 영국 잉글랜드 데폰에서 William Pyne IV(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1367년 영국 잉글랜드 데폰 웨스트 다운에서 37세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Joan Brightley родилась в 1330 г. в местности хинтон сачвилл, девон, Англия, её отцу по имени Brightley было 23 года, а матери, которую звали Joan Stowford, 23. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени William Pyne IV в 1343 г. в местности девон, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла в 1367 г. в местности вест доун, девон, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 37 лет.
